arts.ttl: ‘This renewal is everything’ - Martin thrilled by new Barca contract
arts.sum: The 22-year-old has broken into the first team this season, as back-up to Alejandro Balde, and says it’s a dream to play for the Catalan giants. “You know it is very difficult, but I have achieved it and I am very happy.

arts.ttl: Barca could be set for windfall from Faye as Leverkusen eye defender
arts.sum: The defender joined French side Rennes in the summer but is being linked with a winter transfer to Bundesliga side Bayer Leverkusen. Bayer also have more experienced options in the list but appreciate Faye and it all depends on Rennes position.
